description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named FBGEMM_GPU Nightly Build that runs on a schedule and on push and pull request events to the main branch. The workflow has two jobs: build_artifact and test_and_publish_artifact. The build_artifact job runs on a linux.12xlarge host, sets up Miniconda, and builds FBGEMM_GPU nightly packages for Python 3.8, 3.9, and 3.10 with CUDA 11.7.1. The test_and_publish_artifact job runs on a linux.g5.4xlarge.nvidia.gpu host, downloads the built artifact, tests it with PyTest, and pushes it to PyPI if the workflow is not triggered by a pull request or push event.
